# opnsense_dhcpv4_subnet (Data Source)

Look up an existing DHCPv4 subnet on OPNsense by UUID without importing it into Terraform management.

## Example Usage

```terraform
# Look up an existing DHCPv4 subnet by UUID
data "opnsense_dhcpv4_subnet" "example" {
  id = "12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012"
}

output "dhcpv4_subnet_id" {
  value = data.opnsense_dhcpv4_subnet.example.id
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `id` (String) UUID to look up.

### Read-Only

- `description` (String) Description of the subnet.
- `option_data` (String) DHCP option data.
- `pools` (String) DHCP pool definitions.
- `subnet` (String) Subnet in CIDR notation.
